positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~grew_up_in_health_conscious_childhood_home(taylor)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~disregard_physical_well_being(taylor)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~eat_salads_regularly(taylor)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~eat_salads_regularly(X0) | very_conscious_about_health(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~disregard_physical_well_being(X0) | ~very_conscious_about_health(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~grew_up_in_health_conscious_childhood_home(X0) | eat_salads_regularly(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define fulfill_daily_nutritional_intakes(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define visit_gym_at_least_once_a_day(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
